race.description: Mckimms Real Estate Grafton Guineas Prelude (Bm66) Hcp
race.comment: SWAG (1) has returned from a spell in good order, battling on well for third at his latest outing over 1350m at Doomben. Honest three-year-old who should find this a shade easier and will be ready to peak at the third run back. NEED FOR SPIETH (3) impressed first-up over 1300m at Toowoomba three weeks ago, making a sustained run from last at one stage to win by a whisker. Sparingly raced gelding who can take this next step. RUSSIANTOTHEPOST (5) returns for a second campaign off a 20-week break. Progressed nicely in the maiden prep including a close third over the mile in a Class 1 at the Sunshine Coast most recently. Capable of going to a new level this time in work. CLIVE'S GLORY (2) has been freshened up since missing the placings over 2000m at the Sunshine Coast poly seven weeks ago. Bolted in at the Sunny Coast in a recent trial. Should sprint well while fresh. PERMISSION DENIED (4) has won two races, both at or around today's trip. In the mix.
